core.resourcepack.title: <green><bold>Applying resource pack
core.resourcepack.subtitle: <gray>Please wait...
core.resourcepack.required_message: <red>You must accept the resource pack to play on this server
core.effect.anti_heal.received: You can no longer regenerate health!
core.effect.anti_heal.description: <white>Anti Heal<reset> stops you from being able to regenerate health
core.effect.silence.received: You have been silenced for <alt>{seconds}</alt> seconds.
core.effect.frozen.blocked_action: You cannot do this while frozen
core.effect.frozen.target_immune: <yellow>{target}</yellow> is frozen and cannot receive damage!
core.effect.frozen.attacker_blocked: You cannot damage anything while you are frozen!
core.effect.frozen.description: Freezes the player, preventing movement, damage, and other actions
core.effect.deaths_curse.expired: You are no longer cursed to death.
core.effect.deaths_curse.description: <white>Death's Curse</white> will take the life of the target upon expiring.
core.effect.protection.pickup_blocked: You cannot pick up this item with protection
core.effect.protection.target_protected: This is a new player and is protected from damage!
core.effect.protection.attacker_protecte: You cannot damage other players while you have protection!
